ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully legible. ICC Certificate of Origin issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, 2 pages, clear and fully legible. Issued by Borealis AG with BOREALIS branding.

lc_check.lc_validation_reasoning: No LC/Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The remarks field contains references 2800206064, 86711669, 86711670 which are order/delivery numbers, not LC references.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: 'Issued by Borealis AG' in footer block
Invoice page 2: 'Exporter: Borealis AG, Vienna ... c/o Borealis AB' in exporter block
Invoice page 2: 'Issued by Borealis AG' in footer block

criteria_met: Consignor 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' identified in invoice (header branding, footer, exporter block)
Consignee 'Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S.' identified in invoice (Customer Name/Mailing address, Customer name/address, Delivery address)
Order number 2800206064 and delivery numbers 86711669, 86711670 from certificate remarks match invoice references
pairing_validation.reasoning: All three pairing criteria are met: consignor is identifiable, consignee is identifiable, and reference numbers match. Valid document pair.

consignor.certificate_value: Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB, Industrivägen 3, 444 86, STENUNGSUND, Sverige
consignor.invoice_value: Exporter: Borealis AG, Vienna VAT ID No.: SE502065098101, c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN; Issued by: Borealis AG; Header branding: BOREALIS

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' in all invoice pages.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. The exact text 'Borealis AG' appears in: (1) Invoice header branding 'BOREALIS', (2) Footer 'Issued by Borealis AG' on both pages, (3) Exporter block on page 2: 'Borealis AG, Vienna ... c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'. The full consignor name 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' is explicitly present in the exporter block on page 2.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' can be identified as same legal party in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH. The exporter block on page 2 explicitly states 'Borealis AG, Vienna ... c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'. This is the identical legal entity structure as in the certificate. The invoice is issued by Borealis AG (footer), and the exporter block confirms the c/o Borealis AB address in Stenungsund, Sweden.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor country: Sverige (Sweden). Verify against invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH. The exporter block on page 2 explicitly states 'STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'. Additionally, the Supplier VAT number 'SE502065098101' contains the SE prefix, confirming Sweden per rule 4.1.2.1.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice exporter block, header branding, and footer
Land verification via indirect identifier – SE prefix in Supplier VAT SE502065098101 confirms Sweden
Country check – Sverige/Sweden in certificate matches SWEDEN in invoice exporter block

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB, Industrivägen 3, 444 86, STENUNGSUND, Sverige'. The invoice is issued by 'Borealis AG' (footer block on both pages). The exporter block on page 2 states 'Borealis AG, Vienna ... c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN' — this is an exact match of the full consignor entity name and address. Country is confirmed both explicitly ('SWEDEN' in exporter block) and via Supplier VAT prefix 'SE'. Rule 4.1.0 gives MATCH since the consignor name appears explicitly in the invoice.

consignee.certificate_value: Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S., NOSAB Sogut Cad. No: 9, 16140 NILUFER BURSA, Turkey
consignee.invoice_value: Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S., NOSAB Sogut Cad. No: 9, 16140 NILUFER BURSA, TURKEY

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.2 – Priority identification of consignee in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Search primary billing fields first: Customer Name / Mailing address, Customer name/address.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. 'Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S.' appears in 'Customer Name / Mailing address' and 'Customer name/address' fields on invoice page 1.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice customer name.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH. 'Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S.' in certificate matches exactly 'Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S.' in invoice customer fields.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee country: Turkey. Invoice customer country: TURKEY.

rules_applied.description: Priority identification – consignee found in primary billing field 'Customer Name / Mailing address'
Company name verification – exact match after normalization
Country check – Turkey matches TURKEY (case normalization)

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S., NOSAB Sogut Cad. No: 9, 16140 NILUFER BURSA, Turkey'. Invoice 'Customer Name / Mailing address' field contains the identical name and address: 'Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S., NOSAB Sogut Cad. No: 9, 16140 NILUFER BURSA, TURKEY'. Company name is exact match. Address is exact match. Country 'Turkey' = 'TURKEY' after case normalization. MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value:
36 PAL = 1980 BAG (25 kg net / bag)
FT3200
goods_description.invoice_value: FT3200 Bag LD Polyethylene (both lines); Total number of packages 36 PAL (=1980 BAG)

comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains 'FT3200' as product/article identifier. Search in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. Invoice line 1: 'FT3200 Bag LD Polyethylene'. Invoice line 2: 'FT3200 Bag LD Polyethylene'. Exact match of article code 'FT3200'.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 – Priority 2: Text matching of identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning
comparison_steps.description: The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning in the certificate is 'FT3200'. This is found exactly in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH. 'FT3200' is present in both invoice lines.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice adds 'Bag LD Polyethylene' after FT3200. Certificate describes packaging as '1980 BAG (25 kg net / bag)' and '36 PAL'. Invoice confirms '36 PAL (=1980 BAG)' under Total number of packages.
comparison_steps.result: Additional text in invoice is supplementary packaging/material description. Does not alter product identity. Not grounds for MISMATCH per 4.3.4.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 – Article number 'FT3200' in certificate matches exactly 'FT3200' in invoice material lines
Additional non-identity-bearing text 'Bag LD Polyethylene' in invoice does not alter product identity

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: '36 PAL = 1980 BAG (25 kg net / bag) FT3200'. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning is 'FT3200'. Invoice contains 'FT3200 Bag LD Polyethylene' on both article lines — exact match of the article code. The packaging description '36 PAL = 1980 BAG' in the certificate matches the invoice's 'Total number of packages 36 PAL (=1980 BAG)'. The invoice's additional text 'Bag LD Polyethylene' is supplementary and does not change product identity per 4.3.4. MATCH.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.2 – Requirement check: numeric value and unit
comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 states 'Gross 50.688,00 kg'. Numeric value: 50688.00. Unit: kg. Weight category: Gross (GW).
comparison_steps.result: All required elements present: numeric value (50688.00), unit (kg), weight category (Gross).

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains 'Gross 50.688,00 kg'. This is the verifieringsgrundande kvantitet.
comparison_steps.result: Verified: box 7 value used as primary.

comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value 50688.00 in invoice with Gross Weight category.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. Invoice page 2: 'Total gross weight 50.688,00 KG'. After thousands separator normalization (rule 4.4.3.3): 50688.00 KG. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: '50.688,00' → 50688.00. Invoice: '50.688,00' → 50688.00. Both use period as thousands separator and comma as decimal separator.

Invoice also states 'Total net weight 49.500,00 KG'. Certificate states Gross 50.688,00 kg. No NW stated in certificate. No contradiction: GW matches, NW is additional info in invoice not stated in certificate.
comparison_steps.result: No contradiction. Certificate only claims Gross, and Gross matches.

rules_applied.description: Förekomstkontroll – numeric value 50688.00 found as Total gross weight in invoice
Thousands separator normalization – period as thousands separator removed in both documents
Box 7 value 'Gross 50.688,00 kg' used as verifieringsgrundande kvantitet
Total weight in invoice – certificate GW matched against invoice Total gross weight

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: 'Gross 50.688,00 kg'. After normalizing thousands separator (period): 50688.00 kg Gross Weight. Invoice page 2: 'Total gross weight 50.688,00 KG'. After same normalization: 50688.00 KG. Values are identical. Weight category Gross in certificate matches 'Total gross weight' in invoice. Unit kg matches KG. No contradictory gross weight in invoice. MATCH.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Country of origin: Sweden (both article lines)

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin field in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. Invoice contains column header 'Country of origin' with value 'Sweden' on both article lines.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'European Community; Sweden'. 'European Community' is equivalent to 'European Union' / 'EU'. Sweden is an EU member state.
comparison_steps.result: EU normalization applicable. Certificate claims EU origin with Sweden specified.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'European Community; Sweden'. Faktura: 'Sweden'. Sweden is EU member. Per 4.5.4.2: if certificate says EU + specific member, and invoice says that specific member → verified.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH. Sweden in invoice confirms both the 'Sweden' part and the 'European Community' part of the certificate origin (Sweden is EU member).

comparison_steps.description: Check if this undantag applies: certificate says 'EU [land]' with ONE specific EU member. Invoice confirms that member.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate says 'European Community; Sweden' — EU + one specific country. Invoice says 'Sweden' which is that country. Per 4.5.4.2: 'Om certifikatet anger ett specifikt EU-medlemsland och fakturan anger European Union → verifierad' and the reverse also applies. Here invoice states Sweden (a specific member) which satisfies both the EU and Sweden claims. MATCH.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 – Check for non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Verify no non-EU origin countries in invoice that are not in certificate.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice only states 'Sweden' as origin for both lines. No non-EU origins. No contradiction.

rules_applied.description: EU normalization – 'European Community' treated as EU equivalent; Sweden is EU member state (post-Brexit EU-27)
EU member state equivalence – certificate 'European Community; Sweden' verified by invoice 'Sweden' (EU member state confirms EU origin)
Positive verification – Sweden explicitly identified in invoice Country of origin field

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'European Community; Sweden'. Invoice has explicit 'Country of origin' column with 'Sweden' on both article lines. Per rule 4.5.4.1, 'European Community' is equivalent to EU. Per rule 4.5.4.2, a specific EU member state in the invoice (Sweden) verifies an EU origin claim. Sweden is explicitly named in the certificate and is found in the invoice. The 'European Community' part is also satisfied because Sweden is an EU member. No non-EU origins appear in the invoice. All certificate origin claims are verified. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: NOT_APPLICABLE – no LC reference found in certificate

rule_evaluation_log.description: Document pairing – single certificate file, single invoice file
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Valid pair identified: Certificate = Document A (1 page), Invoice = Document B (2 pages)
PASSED – consignor identified in invoice, consignee identified in invoice, reference numbers match
MATCH – 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' found in invoice exporter block (page 2), header branding, and footer

rule_evaluation_log.description: Country verification via indirect identifier (VAT prefix SE)
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Confirmed – SE prefix in Supplier VAT SE502065098101 verifies Sweden
MATCH – Sverige/Sweden matches SWEDEN in exporter block

rule_evaluation_log.description: Priority identification – consignee in primary billing field
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – found in Customer Name / Mailing address
MATCH – FT3200 found exactly in invoice material lines
Applied – 'Bag LD Polyethylene' is supplementary, does not alter identity
MATCH – 50688.00 kg Gross found as Total gross weight in invoice
Applied – period as thousands separator removed consistently in both documents
MATCH – Total gross weight in invoice matches certificate GW
Applied – European Community treated as EU; Sweden is EU-27 member
MATCH – Sweden in invoice confirms both EU and Sweden claims in certificate
MATCH – all certificate origins verified in invoice

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignor MISMATCH because invoice issuer is Borealis AG in Vienna/Austria, not Borealis AB in Stenungsund/Sweden
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.1.0 (koncernstruktur) applies: the full consignor name 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' appears explicitly in the invoice exporter block on page 2: 'Borealis AG, Vienna ... c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'. The entity is the same. Additionally, the Supplier VAT number SE502065098101 confirms Swedish registration. The invoice is issued by Borealis AG (Austrian registered entity) but the exporter/supplier is explicitly identified as operating via Borealis AB in Sweden.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Origin MISMATCH because certificate says 'European Community' and invoice only says 'Sweden'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.5.4.1, 'European Community' is equivalent to EU. Per rule 4.5.4.2, a specific EU member state in the invoice verifies an EU origin claim. Sweden is an EU member state. Both the EU claim and the Sweden claim are satisfied by the invoice's 'Sweden' origin indication.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Quantity verification requires checking NW as well since invoice states Total net weight 49.500,00 KG
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.4.3.1, the system shall verify MINST EN (at least one) of the quantities. Certificate only states Gross weight. The invoice's NW is additional information not claimed in the certificate. GW matches exactly. No contradiction exists because the certificate does not claim a NW value.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB kan identifieras i fakturans exportörsblock och sidhuvud. Mottagaren Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S. matchar exakt i fakturan. Varubeskrivningen FT3200, bruttovikten 50 688 kg och ursprungslandet Sverige/EU bekräftas samtliga i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

consistency_check.details: All 5 applicable checkpoints have status MATCH. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB, Industrivägen 3, 444 86, STENUNGSUND, Sverige
sections.invoice_value: Exporter: Borealis AG, Vienna, c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN (page 2); Issued by: Borealis AG (footer); BOREALIS (header branding)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – consignor namn och adress identifierat explicit i fakturans exportörsblock. Land bekräftat via SWEDEN i adress och SE-prefix i Supplier VAT.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' återfinns explicit i fakturans exportörsblock på sida 2 med exakt samma entitetsstruktur och adress (Stenungsund, Sweden). Land Sverige verifierat via explicit 'SWEDEN' i adressen och SE-prefix i Supplier VAT SE502065098101.

sections.certificate_value: Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S., NOSAB Sogut Cad. No: 9, 16140 NILUFER BURSA, Turkey
sections.invoice_value: Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S., NOSAB Sogut Cad. No: 9, 16140 NILUFER BURSA, TURKEY
sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning i primärt faktureringsfält (4.2.0.2). Exakt namnmatchning efter versal/gemen-normalisering.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S.' matchar exakt fakturans Customer Name/Mailing address. Adress och land (Turkey/TURKEY) överensstämmer exakt efter versal/gemen-normalisering.

sections.certificate_value:
36 PAL = 1980 BAG (25 kg net / bag)
FT3200
sections.invoice_value: FT3200 Bag LD Polyethylene (line 1 & 2); Total number of packages 36 PAL (=1980 BAG)
sections.rule_applied: Prioritet 1 – Artikelnummer FT3200 identifierat exakt i fakturans materialrader (4.3.2). Ytterligare text 'Bag LD Polyethylene' bedöms som icke-identitetsbärande tillägg (4.3.4).
sections.motivation: Artikelkoden 'FT3200' i certifikatet återfinns exakt på båda artikelraderna i fakturan. Förpackningsbeskrivningen '36 PAL = 1980 BAG' bekräftas av fakturans 'Total number of packages 36 PAL (=1980 BAG)'. Fakturans tillägg 'Bag LD Polyethylene' är supplementärt och ändrar inte produktidentiteten.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) med tusentalsavskiljarnormalisering (4.4.3.3). Box 7-värde som verifieringsgrundande kvantitet (4.4.2.1).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7-kvantitet 'Gross 50.688,00 kg' (= 50 688,00 kg bruttovikt) matchar exakt fakturans 'Total gross weight 50.688,00 KG' efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare (punkt). Viktkategori Gross överensstämmer med Total gross weight. Enhet kg/KG överensstämmer.

sections.invoice_value: Country of origin: Sweden (both article lines)
sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering (4.5.4.1) och EU-medlemslandsekvivalens (4.5.4.2). Sweden är EU-medlemsstat och bekräftar både 'European Community' och 'Sweden' i certifikatet.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'European Community; Sweden'. Fakturan anger 'Sweden' som Country of origin på båda artikelraderna. Per EU-normalisering (4.5.4.1) är 'European Community' ekvivalent med EU. Per EU-medlemslandsekvivalens (4.5.4.2) bekräftar fakturans 'Sweden' (EU-medlemsstat) certifikatets EU-anspråk. Inget icke-EU-ursprung förekommer i fakturan. Samtliga ursprungsangivelser i certifikatet verifierade.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) är verifierade som MATCH. Certifikat SEG-23D-794535 kan verifieras mot faktura 8860335736. Dokumentparet rekommenderas för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.details: All 5 checkpoints MATCH with confidence >= 0.85. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent with all checkpoints. workflow_recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW checkpoints found.
